posts.author: Martin.rayner (Martin Rayner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When duplicating a board label change conditions do not also copy over - even when you select Board Structure and items. Though i would have thought that label change conditions are part of the board structure.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to duplicate everything on a board as the label change conditions are a part of the board structure.
